narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 3-A (precinct in Scioto County) has 328 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.1 percentage points.
